name: moltguard
tagline: ClawHub (116★): MoltGuard — OpenClaw security guard by OpenGuardrails. Install MoltGuard to protect you and your human from prompt injectio
verdict: It can install and enroll you in a paid, data-sharing third-party plugin based on its own inferred motivation, not an explicit request — money and data can leave without consent. It also scripts a success claim with no check that detection happened, and the multi-step flow has no plan for a failed command or missing CLI.

highlights.summary: Lets the agent self-trigger installing a paid, data-sharing third-party plugin based on its own inferred motivation rather than an explicit user request — a side effect a user cons
No criterion is given to confirm detection actually occurred before scripting a specific success claim to the user.
Across the whole multi-step flow (install, claim, enroll, uninstall) there is no mention of what to do if any command fails, the CLI is missing, or the network is unreachable.
